calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-victoire, S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: B.D. Thakor.
Plaintiff's Witness: Anil Patel, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Larry Dale Emery.
Exh. 1 - Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Billy Bridgewater as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 56 Mason St., #206, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $999.18
Costs $230.00, for a Total of $1,229.18
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Mendez for B.D. Thakor; Laura Chiera, limited scope attorney for Dale Emery

Counsel check in with clerk but do not appear before settlement judge. Trial date remains.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer; Clerk Kay Peek; not reported (218)
